name: Great Vows
description: A multi-tradition Zen chant book and practice companion

crossLinks.label: Heart of Great Perfect Wisdom Sutra
crossLinks.note: Different translations; SFZC uses Mel Weitsman/Red Pine lineage, ZCD uses Kapleau/Rochester lineage

crossLinks.label: Harmony of Difference and Equality / Affirming Faith in Mind
crossLinks.note: SFZC chants Sandokai (Shitou); ZCD chants Affirming Faith in Mind (Sengcan) — related but distinct texts

crossLinks.label: Song of the Jewel Mirror Samadhi
crossLinks.note: ZCD explicitly credits SFZC/Thomas Cleary translation as source

crossLinks.label: Fukanzazengi / Universal Recommendations for Zazen
crossLinks.note: Both chant Dogen's text; different translations

crossLinks.label: Loving Kindness / Metta Sutta
crossLinks.note: Both draw from Pali source; different translations
